---
title: "Writing"
subtitle: "Research, exposition, outreach and teaching ideas for readers at different levels."
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: mn-writing-featured
    contents: articles
    include:
      featured: true
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    max-items: 4
    fields: [image, title, description, date, categories]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
  - id: mn-writing-latest
    contents: articles
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    fields: [image, title, description, date, reading-time, categories]
    sort-ui: [date, title]
    filter-ui: [title, description, categories]
    feed:
      items: 20
      type: partial
      title: "Writing from Math Nomad"
---

::: {.content-block .mn-page-lead}
This is the intellectual notebook of Math Nomad: polished exposition beside research notes, outreach ideas and reflections on teaching. Audience labels suggest a starting point without placing a fence around the mathematics.
:::

::: {.content-block .mn-taxonomy}
::: {}
<p class="mn-kicker">BROWSE BY AUDIENCE</p>

::: {.mn-chip-row .mn-chip-links}
[Everyone](#category=Everyone)
[School teachers](#category=School%20teachers)
[Undergraduate](#category=Undergraduate)
[Graduate & research](#category=Graduate%20%26%20research)
:::
:::

::: {}
<p class="mn-kicker">KINDS OF WRITING</p>

::: {.mn-chip-row .mn-chip-links}
[Exposition](#category=Exposition)
[Research](#category=Research)
[Outreach](#category=Outreach)
[Teaching](#category=Teaching)
[Reflections](#category=Reflections)
:::
:::
:::

::: {.content-block .mn-listing-section}
<p class="mn-kicker">PINNED</p>

## Featured writing

::: {#mn-writing-featured}
:::
:::

::: {.content-block .mn-listing-section}
## Latest writing

Newest pieces appear first. Use the categories or search box to narrow the collection by audience, kind or mathematical topic.

::: {#mn-writing-latest}
:::
:::
